title: psydrax odoratus subsp. arnhemicus
intro: Psydrax odoratus subsp. arnhemicus is a subspecies of the Psydrax odoratus plant, also known as the aromatic Psydrax or West Australian Psydrax, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Psydrax odoratus subsp. arnhemicus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
